title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Quality Engineering Board
summary: Fresh repository setup, configuration review, failing-gate diagnosis, sanitizer, CI security, and maintenance cases across TypeScript, Python, and native code. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.
Document bounded suppressions, owners, expiry, and review evidence.
Keep one canonical config per concern and document generated files.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Plan the cumulative evidence run
steps.instruction: Order the Repo Purpose evidence cycle for this exam task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Repo Purpose assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed exam case for gates maintenance that tests this competency: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Repo Purpose has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Repo Purpose precondition or invariant that the exam case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed exam case for gates maintenance that tests this competency: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Every new repository should use the same maximum gate set.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the exam Repo Purpose case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the exam Repo Purpose case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the exam Repo Purpose case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the exam Repo Purpose case
